description: Bombora is a B2B intent data provider that measures content consumption across thousands of sites to show which accounts are actively researching a purchase.
overview: Bombora measures B2B content consumption across thousands of sites to reveal which companies are in-market, feeding intent data into CRM, marketing, and ad platforms.
what_is: Bombora is a B2B intent-data provider. It aggregates content-consumption signals from a large cooperative of business sites and analyzes them to show which accounts are researching topics related to what you sell, so teams can engage at the right moment.

It is most useful for identifying in-market accounts, reducing churn risk, and tailoring messaging to what an audience is actually reading. Because data can be activated in real time, teams can prioritize and personalize campaigns quickly.

Bombora integrates with CRM, marketing automation, and ad platforms like HubSpot, Salesforce, and LinkedIn. It is explicitly a data provider rather than a standalone platform, so it relies on your existing systems to act on its signals.
